title: Throw Away Your Books, Rally in the Streets
original_title: 書を捨てよ町へ出よう
overview: An experimental, psychedelic odyssey through Japanese subculture experienced via the eyes of a disillusioned young man, who must contend with intense familial dysfunction, psychosexual alienation, and existentialist malaise.
